title: VIR Stock Quote and Market Sentiment
text: Vir Biotechnology (VIR) retail sentiment was extremely bullish amid extremely high message volume on Stocktwits. This bullish sentiment was observed following positive company news, with users expressing optimism about the company's pipeline and strategic partnerships. VIR stock has shown significant volatility tied to earnings announcements and clinical trial data releases. Following the Q1 2026 earnings announcement, VIR stock declined 7.39% in after-hours trading but has shown strong performance over longer timeframes, with the stock gaining 75% over the past year and 63% over six months. The stock has been a runner stock for retail investors interested in biotech and clinical-stage development companies. Vir Biotechnology is a clinical-stage biopharmaceutical company that discovers and develops therapeutic products to treat and prevent serious infectious diseases, with its clinical development pipeline consisting of product investigational therapies targeting hepatitis delta virus, hepatitis B, HIV, and oncology (prostate cancer).
